description.value:
Wondrous Item, Very Rare

An ornate gemstone-studded wooden chest weighing 25 lbs while empty. Interior is a 1.5-ft cube. Has 20 charges. Use an action to touch the closed lid, expend 1 charge, and name nonmagical objects worth 1 gp or less total — they appear inside. Food spoils in 24 hours. Gems/metals vanish after 1 minute. Regains 1d20 charges at dawn. On final charge expended, roll d20: on 1, becomes ordinary chest.
